name: Broodmother
description: Black Arachnia, the Broodmother lurked in the dark lava tubes beneath Mount Pyrotheos, raising millions of spiderlings in safety before sending them to find prey above.

abilities.name: Spider's Milk
abilities.description: The applied lifesteal-based heal is less effective from deny sources. Only denies from Broodmother may proc the heal component. The higher Broodmother's level, the greater the enemy max health as heal value.

abilities.name: Insatiable Hunger
abilities.description: Grants a flat base attack damage increment per second.

abilities.name: Spin Web
abilities.description: This unit does not feel the effects from any damage sources. It cannot be targeted by attacks or abilities and have its health bar temporarily hidden.

abilities.name: Incapacitating Bite
abilities.description: Applies a movement speed slow and blind debuff per successful attack. The debuff-affected units have a chance to miss their attacks. Paralytic toxins come from Black Arachnia's fangs, causing a slow and painful death to those who intrude on her webs.

abilities.name: Spinner's Snare
abilities.description: Creates invisible web-snares next to any current webs that acts as a trap. The snares have an activation delay. Enemy heroes crossing the web will spring the trap — rooting, exposing them in the Fog of War while dealing damage over time.

abilities.name: Spawn Spiderlings
abilities.description: Broodmother injects her young into an enemy unit and deals damage. Upon the affected unit's death, her babies mature, hatching young Spiderlings to aid her in the battlefield. Multiple debuff instances on the affected enemy unit work independently of each other. The ability no longer applies its ability effect on the affected enemy upon exceeding the max debuff stack.
